short.en: A small golden-brown pie, still warm.

long.en: A small round pie with a golden crust and a sweet smell. The baker pulls them fresh from the oven all day. Eating one feels just a little bit better than not eating one.
long.cs: Malý kulatý koláč se zlatou kůrkou, voní sladce. Pekař je celý den vytahuje z pece čerstvé. Když ho sníš, cítíš se trošku líp.

no_target.self: you eat the small pie. It's warm and sweet.

to_target.self: you offer the small pie to {target}, who eats it.
to_target.others: {actor} offers a small pie to {target}, who eats it.

no_target.self: sníš malý koláč. Je teplý a sladký.

to_target.self: podáš malý koláč {target.dat} a ten ho sní.
to_target.others: {actor} podává malý koláč {target.dat} a ten ho sní.
